word: G3405 - μισθαποδοσία - misthapodosía - mis-thap-od-os-ee'-ah - Recompence of reward

sections.paragraph:
- Original: μισθαποδοσία

- Transliteration: Misthapodosia

- Phonetic: mis-thap-od-os-ee'-ah

- Definition:

1. payment of wages due, recompence

- Origin: from G3406

- TDNT entry: 15:35,6

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From G3406; requital (good or bad): - recompence of reward.
